refined_caption: The hospital privacy curtain in the room is torn and damaged. It appears to be hanging loosely from the rod.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the privacy curtain in my hospital room. It's torn and doesn't provide any privacy, which is really concerning. I hope it can be replaced or fixed soon.
voice_text: The curtain in my room is all torn, can someone please fix it or replace it?
